ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "buy_sell" TEXT /* Type of trade (Buy or Sell) */,
  "script_name" TEXT /* Name of the script (stock) being traded */,
  "recom_price" TEXT /* Recommended price for the trade */,
  "stoploss" TEXT /* Stoploss price for the trade */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target price for the trade */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the trade (e.g., Intraday, BTST) */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Remarks or additional notes for the trade */,
  "profit_loss" TEXT /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the trade */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trade (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "trade_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the script being traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade execution */,
  "trade_strategy" TEXT /* Trading strategy (e.g., intraday, BTST) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the trade was executed */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "broker" TEXT /* Broker through which the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_script_name FOREIGN KEY ("script_name") REFERENCES scripts ("script_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scripts" (
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each script */,
  "script_name" TEXT /* Name of the script (stock) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the script */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the company belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_traded_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the script */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the script traded in the last session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the script's details */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Unique symbol for the script */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "last_52_week_high" REAL /* Highest price in the last 52 weeks */,
  "last_52_week_low" REAL /* Lowest price in the last 52 weeks */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price to earnings ratio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the script */,
  "dividend_yield" TEXT /* Dividend yield */,
  "next_earnings_date" TEXT /* Date of the next earnings report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was locked out */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade execution */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being executed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade execution */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the script traded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade execution (e.g., executed, pending, canceled) */,
  "execution_type" TEXT /* Type of execution (e.g., partial, full) */,
  "execution_fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the execution */,
  "execution_commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the execution */,
  "execution_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the execution was made */,
  "execution_exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the execution took place */,
  "execution_broker" TEXT /* Broker through which the execution was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_executions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_executions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being tracked */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "profit_loss" TEXT /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Remarks or additional notes for the trade */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trade history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trade */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific execution */,
  "trade_strategy" TEXT /* Trading strategy (e.g., intraday, BTST) */,
  "profit_loss_amount" REAL /* Numerical value of the profit or loss */,
  "profit_loss_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the profit or loss */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "execution_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the script traded */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the execution */,
  "execution_broker" TEXT /* Broker through which the execution was made */,
  "execution_exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the execution took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES trade_executions ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
